progress.title: Progress (are we there yet?)
progress.warning_detected: Something weird happened but I'm still going!!

success.inference_cancelled: I stopped... is that what you wanted?
success.config_exported: I saved the config for you
success.settings_reset: Everything is back to normal now
success.folder_open_sent: I asked to open the folder...

error.start_failed: I couldn't start... check the console.
error.validation_failed: The paths are wrong!! Check the console.
error.beatmap_invalid_ext: It has to be a .osu file!!
error.audio_or_beatmap_required: I need a map or music to start!!
error.output_or_beatmap_required: I need to know where to put it!!
error.browse_failed: I can't look for it. Is the backend okay?
error.connection_lost: I lost you!! The connection is gone.
error.file_not_found: A file I needed is GONE.
error.generation_error: I messed up the map... check the logs.
error.task_error: I couldn't even start the task...

confirm.reset_settings: Are you REALLY sure you want to reset everything? I'll forget everything!!

links.view_warning_log: Show me the scary warning log...
links.open_folder: Click here to see the map I made for you.
links.open_log: See why I failed... (opens error log)
